property.name: addInventoryCreate
property.value: AddInventoryComponent should create the component

property.name: addInventoryInvalid
property.value: AddInventoryComponent Form validation should not submit the form with invalid inputs

property.name: addInventoryValid
property.value: AddInventoryComponent Form validation should submit the form with valid inputs

property.name: createProductCreate
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should create the component

property.name: createProductInvalid
property.value: CreateProductsComponent Form validation should not submit the form with invalid inputs

property.name: createProductValid
property.value: CreateProductsComponent Form validation should submit the form with valid inputs

property.name: placeOrderCreate
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent should create the component

property.name: placeOrderInvalid
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent Form validation should not submit the form with invalid inputs

property.name: placeOrderValid
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent Form validation should submit the form with valid inputs

property.name: loginInvalidAll
property.value: LoginComponent Form validation should have invalid form if username and password are empty

property.name: loginInvalidPartial
property.value: LoginComponent Form validation should have invalid form if username or password is empty

property.name: loginValid
property.value: LoginComponent Form validation should have valid form if username and password are provided

property.name: registrationInvalidEmpty
property.value: RegistrationComponent Form validation should have invalid form if any field is empty

property.name: registrationInvalidEmail
property.value: RegistrationComponent Form validation should have invalid form if email is invalid

property.name: registrationValid
property.value: RegistrationComponent Form validation should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly

property.name: httpGetProductsWholesaler
property.value: HttpService #getProductsByWholesaler should retrieve products for wholesaler via GET with headers

property.name: httpGetProductsConsumer
property.value: HttpService #getProductsByConsumers should retrieve products for consumers via GET with headers

property.name: httpGetOrdersWholesaler
property.value: HttpService #getOrderByWholesalers should retrieve orders for wholesalers via GET with headers

property.name: httpGetOrdersConsumer
property.value: HttpService #getOrderConsumer should retrieve orders for consumers via GET with headers

property.name: httpGetInventory
property.value: HttpService #getInventoryByWholesalers should retrieve inventory via GET with headers

property.name: httpGetProductsManufacturer
property.value: HttpService #getProductsByManufacturer should retrieve products via GET with headers

property.name: httpPlaceOrder
property.value: HttpService #placeOrder should place order via POST with request body and headers

property.name: httpPlaceOrderConsumer
property.value: HttpService #consumerPlaceOrder should place consumer order via POST with request body and headers

property.name: httpUpdateOrderStatus
property.value: HttpService #updateOrderStatus should update order status via PUT with headers

property.name: httpAddFeedback
property.value: HttpService #addConsumerFeedBack should add feedback via POST with headers

property.name: httpCreateProduct
property.value: HttpService #createProduct should create product via POST with headers

property.name: httpUpdateProduct
property.value: HttpService #updateProduct should update product via PUT with headers

property.name: httpAddInventory
property.value: HttpService #addInventory should add inventory via POST with headers

property.name: httpUpdateInventory
property.value: HttpService #updateInventory should update inventory via PUT with headers

property.name: httpLogin
property.value: HttpService #Login should authenticate user via POST and return token

property.name: httpRegister
property.value: HttpService #registerUser should register user via POST

property.name: backendRegisterUser
property.value: Backend should register user and persist user details successfully

property.name: backendLoginUser
property.value: Backend should login user and return authentication token

property.name: backendLoginInvalid
property.value: Backend should return unauthorized for invalid login credentials

property.name: backendCreateProduct
property.value: Backend Manufacturer API should create product successfully

property.name: backendUpdateProduct
property.value: Backend Manufacturer API should update product successfully

property.name: backendGetManufacturerProducts
property.value: Backend Manufacturer API should retrieve all products of manufacturer

property.name: backendBrowseProducts
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should browse all available products

property.name: backendPlaceOrderWholesaler
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should place order successfully

property.name: backendUpdateOrderStatus
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should update order status successfully

property.name: backendGetWholesalerOrders
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should retrieve all wholesaler orders

property.name: backendAddInventory
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should add inventory successfully

property.name: backendUpdateInventory
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should update inventory successfully

property.name: backendGetInventories
property.value: Backend Wholesaler API should retrieve all inventories

property.name: backendPlaceOrderConsumer
property.value: Backend Consumer API should place order successfully

property.name: backendGetConsumerOrders
property.value: Backend Consumer API should retrieve all consumer orders

property.name: backendProvideFeedback
property.value: Backend Consumer API should provide feedback successfully

property.name: backendManufacturerForbidden
property.value: Backend should restrict manufacturer APIs for unauthorized roles

property.name: backendWholesalerForbidden
property.value: Backend should restrict wholesaler APIs for unauthorized roles

property.name: backendConsumerForbidden
property.value: Backend should restrict consumer APIs for unauthorized roles
